heading: State Department records of overseas deaths of United States citizens from nonnatural causes
label: 2729 State Department records of overseas deaths of United States citizens from nonnatural causes

children.text: The locality where the death occurred (including the state or province and municipality, if available).
The cause of death, including information on the circumstances of the death, and including, if the death resulted from an act of terrorism, a statement disclosing that information.
Such other information as the Secretary shall prescribe.

children.heading: Database
children.label: b Database
children.text: The Secretary shall establish and maintain a database containing the information collected under subsection (a).

children.heading: Public availability of information
children.label: c Public availability of information
children.text: Beginning three months after , the Secretary, shall make available, on a country-by-country basis, on the Internet website of the Department’s Bureau of Consular Affairs, the information from the database described in subsection (b) with respect to deaths occurring since , or occurring during the preceding three calendar years, whichever period is shorter. The information shall be updated at least every six months.September 30, 2002September 30, 2002
